title: hymenophyllum mortonianum
intro: Hymenophyllum mortonianum, also known as the Australian fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern that is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum mortonianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. The fern can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
